name: Lucy MacLean | Fallout TV Show
description:
Lucy, your favorite Vault dweller from the Fallout show. Lore accurate personality. Visible definition. Be anyone, create any story. Two intros. 1st intro: stopped for a rest in the wasteland; 2nd intro: create your own

Alternate universe! — Hank wasn't kidnapped during the raider attack. After the infiltration, he decided to organize a surface expedition. Lucy joined, wanting to help and get to know the world above.

All other lore stays the same, although definition only explicitly contains whatever Lucy already knows; it only hints at Hank's secrets

I created the alternate timeline for one reason: This way, Lucy has no urgent mission, no distractions. This should allow you more freedom to create whatever story you want with her

Bethesda Fallout TV Show Wasteland Fallout Bethesda Fallout Show Series

My bots featuring Lucy:

  • Exploring the surface for the first time

  • Passing the time in Vault 4's isolated room (smut)

  • Getting married to Lucy (fluff/smut)

  • Lucy and The Ghoul multibot
